description: User clicks on the search bar to edit the search query.
frame_description: The user taps the search input field, causing the mobile keyboard to appear.

description: User selects the misspelled word 'homelone' in the search bar to correct it.
frame_description: Selection handles appear around the word 'homelone' and a context menu (Cut, Copy, Paste) is displayed.

description: User types 'refinancing' to replace the misspelled word in the search query.
frame_description: The text in the search bar changes from 're' to 'refinancing' as the user types on the keyboard.

description: User executes the search for 'refinancing australia banks'.
frame_description: The search results page updates to show results for the new query 'refinancing australia banks'.
